mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, category, description, is_active FROM defect_types ORDER BY code ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO defect_types ( id, code, name, category, description, is_active ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{category}, #{description}, #{isActive} )
mapper.update: UPDATE defect_types SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
